hero.heading: One app to replace them all
hero.laptopAlt: Taskify dashboard preview on a laptop
footer.tagline: Join millions of people who organize work and life with Taskify.
feature.heading: Delightfully simple and deceptively powerful task management
feature.intro: 30 million+ people organize billions of tasks in Todoist for their work, education, and personal life.
feature.card1Text: Use Todoist’s apps, extensions and widgets on any device or platform.
feature.card2Text: Customize your to-do list with filters, labels, priorities, and more.
feature.card3Text: Personal productivity recommendations based on your unique traits and strengths.
feature.card4Text: Hundreds of templates are available to get you started with whatever’s on your plate.
feature.card5Text: Link Todoist with your calendar, voice assistant, and 30+ other tools.
achievements.heading: A task manager you can trust for life
achievements.intro: We’ve been building Todoist for 15 years and 169 days.
achievements.longHaul: We're in it for the long haul.
cookie.text: We use essential cookies to keep Taskify secure and working correctly. You can accept or reject optional cookies.
validation.username_length: Username must be between 3 and 30 characters.
validation.username_pattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, and hyphens.
validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.password_bytes: Password must be 72 bytes or fewer.
validation.password_strength: Password must include at least one letter and one number.
signup.duplicateEmail: This email is already registered. Please log in or use a different email address.
rateLimit.signupIp: Too many signup attempts. Please wait 30 minutes and try again.
rateLimit.signupEmail: Too many signup attempts for this email. Please wait 30 minutes and try again.
rateLimit.loginIp: Too many login attempts. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.
rateLimit.loginAccount: Too many login attempts for this account. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.
login.missing_credentials: Please enter both email and password.
account.delete_missing_password: Please enter your password to delete the account.
account.delete_bad_password: Password confirmation failed. Account was not deleted.
error.auth_retry: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
error.server: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
rateLimit.generic: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
